changes.result: CRITICAL FINDING — BEHAVIOUR-CLASS CHANGE IF MODIFIED
changes.finding: CONFIRMED. root_cause_authority_register_v1.yaml is loaded at runtime by backend/core/knowledge/compiled_output_authority_v1.py via _load_yaml at line 39 (function load_root_cause_authority_register, called at line 52). Path is hardcoded at line 17-18: _REPO_ROOT / 'knowledge_bus' / 'governance' / 'root_cause_authority_register_v1.yaml'. Any change to this file modifies Intelligence Core runtime inputs. Per prompt §Permitted changes last paragraph: if behavioural effect is uncertain, do NOT modify — record required correction in ADR only and leave unchanged for a later dedicated activation-control sprint.

CONFIRMED. batch2_thyroid_gate_execution_register_v1.yaml, batch2_full_coverage_activation_execution_register_v1.yaml, batch2_context_clearance_register_v1.yaml, and medical_frame_identity_index_v1.yaml are NOT loaded by any backend/core/ runtime code. grep over backend/core/ --include='*.py' returned zero matches for all four files. They are referenced only by backend/scripts/ validators and backend/tests/ governance/regression suites. Changes to these four files are CONTENT-class from a runtime behaviour standpoint, but associated tests may require expected-result updates if status corrections are applied.

The prompt prohibits permissive interpretation where registers conflict. The only permitted reconciliation direction is CONSERVATIVE: any ambiguous or conflicted thyroid signal must be assigned the most restrictive status across all relevant registers. Specifically for FT3 low: the gate register (deferred, activated:false) and clearance register (inactive, activation_eligibility:false) are the conservative anchors. The full_coverage register's runtime_active_canonical/ACTIVATE_WITH_GATES entry MUST NOT be treated as sufficient authority to activate FT3 low. If the batch2_full_coverage register is corrected, the correction must align it to deferred/inactive — NOT the reverse. Do not choose the permissive direction.

root_cause_authority_register_v1.yaml records signal_free_t3_low as ROOT_CAUSE_REQUIRES_FUTURE_MAPPING. This is a conservative blocking status. Any correction to this entry must either: (a) make it MORE restrictive (blocked, permanently deferred, or similar), or (b) leave it unchanged. Under no circumstances may the status be changed to ROOT_CAUSE_GOVERNED_ACTIVE or any active status — that would constitute a permissive BEHAVIOUR change touching Intelligence Core. If uncertain about behavioural effect of any change to this file, leave it unchanged and document in ADR.

changes.result: CONFIRMED — must run if YAML register files are changed
changes.finding: If any governance YAML is changed, Cursor must run the corresponding validation: (1) root_cause_authority_register change → run backend/tests/governance/test_arch_completion_2_output_authority.py; (2) batch2_context_clearance change → run backend/tests/governance/test_batch2_context_clearance_register.py; (3) medical_frame_identity_index change → run backend/scripts/validate_medical_frame_identity_index.py; (4) any batch2 register change → run backend/tests/regression/test_batch2_thyroid_tsh_gating.py. If no schema validator exists for a YAML file, state that explicitly in the validation section. If no YAML files are changed (blocker-only outcome), no runtime test suite is required.

overall_verdict: HARDENED — All five front-matter fields confirmed (automation_bus/latest_cursor_prompt.md:2-6). All three prerequisite files confirmed on main. All ten authority files and governance registers verified to exist. P1-4 source content read and all eight blocker findings cross-referenced as confirmed-real. CRITICAL RUNTIME FINDING: root_cause_authority_register_v1.yaml is loaded by backend/core/knowledge/compiled_output_authority_v1.py:39 via yaml.safe_load — any change to it is BEHAVIOUR-class; if behavioural effect is uncertain, leave unchanged and record correction in ADR only. batch2_* registers and medical_frame_identity_index_v1.yaml are NOT runtime-consumed by backend/core/ (grep confirmed zero matches). Reconciliation direction is conservative-only: no thyroid signal may become newly active; FT3 low must remain inactive/deferred; the permissive full_coverage entry must not be treated as authority. Regression targets named per changed file. If authority cannot be reconciled safely, sprint must produce ADR (Status: Blocked) and reconciliation report without YAML modifications — this is a valid and complete sprint outcome. Cursor may proceed under TWO_PHASE_START_FINISH governance.
